mentions.note: Down 14% despite top/bottom beat; Macau margins disappointing from high promotional costs; gambling stocks all struggling; too hard to game given Chinese consumer dependency and CCP crackdown risk.

Down 14% despite beat on top and bottom line; Macau margins disappointed from higher promotional costs on NBA preseason; too risky given CCP crackdown risk on conspicuous consumption; Chinese consumer volatility makes all gambling plays uncertain.
#8 worst January, down ~19%. Disappointing Macau quarter (weak margins, elevated promotional spend). Wealthy Chinese hesitant due to real estate market weakness. Prefer US-focused gaming like Wynn.
